## Governance

- [ ] CHK001 Execution mode is declared and appropriate
- [ ] CHK002 Risk classification and approval gates are explicit
- [ ] CHK003 Scope boundaries and non-goals are recorded
- [ ] CHK004 Invariants are explicit and testable

## Artifacts

- [ ] CHK005 Required artifacts exist at expected paths
- [ ] CHK006 Decision log is current
- [ ] CHK007 Validation evidence location is defined

## Validation

- [ ] CHK008 Structural validation has completed
- [ ] CHK009 Logical validation has completed
- [ ] CHK010 Independent review or adversarial validation has completed

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
